content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/app/layout.tsx:1	import type { Metadata } from "next";2	import { Inter } from "next/font/google";3	import "./globals.css";4	5	const inter = Inter({ subsets: ["latin"] });6	7	export const metadata: Metadata = {8	  title: "Restaurant Management",9	  description: "Manage your restaurant efficiently",10	};11	12	export default function RootLayout({13	  children,14	}: Readonly<{15	  children: React.ReactNode;16	}>) {17	  return (18	    <html lang="en">19	      <body className={inter.className}>{children}</body>20	    </html>21	  );22	}
